puzzles.title: Number Grid

clues.fallback: The odd one out gives three digits. Check the grid pattern.

puzzles.hintText: Look at the shapes of the numbers – which one is different?

puzzles.title: Library Layers

clues.fallback: The poem mentions floor numbers. Read it again carefully.

puzzles.hintText: Which floors are silent? Which are collaborative? The order matters.

puzzles.title: Email Chain

clues.fallback: That's not the correct publication year. Search again for the 6th edition.

puzzles.hintText: The 6th edition of 'The Study Skills Handbook' was published in 2024.

puzzles.title: Blank Page

clues.fallback: The UV torch reveals three numbers. Keep moving the light.

puzzles.hintText: Shine the torch over the blank page – a number will appear.
